content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 I Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 25, 2005

Pamela A. McCarthy, CMC
City Clerk
City of Bakersfield
1501 Truxtun Avenue
Bakersfield, CA 93301

Re: W-05-180

Dear Ms. McCarthy:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your August 16, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ as you requested. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant Counsel, Legal Division

JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
